title: fraxinus xanthoxyloides var. dimorpha
intro: Fraxinus xanthoxyloides var. dimorpha is a lesser-known variety of the Fraxinus xanthoxyloides tree, native to tropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Fraxinus xanthoxyloides var. dimorpha include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
